title: HMRC clarifies EIS advance assurance processing times
summary: New guidance suggests 12-16 week processing for advance assurance applications, with expedited routes for established fund managers. Key changes affect documentation requirements.

title: UK fintech funding drops 23% in Q4 2024
summary: Despite overall decline, AI-focused startups saw 45% increase in average deal size, with three unicorn rounds completed. Regulatory uncertainty cited as primary factor.

title: New FCA guidelines on crypto asset promotions
summary: Enhanced disclosure requirements for high-risk investments come into effect March 2025, affecting marketing to retail investors. Penalties increased significantly.

title: UK angel activity trends Q4 2024
summary: Seed deal count flat QoQ; EIS demand steady at £2.1B. Monitor exits for Q1 2025 as three major portfolio companies approach IPO readiness. Not advice.

title: Biotech startup Cellvax raises £45M Series B
summary: Cambridge-based cell therapy company secures funding from Baillie Gifford and Novo Holdings. EIS qualification confirmed for early seed investors.

title: SEIS annual allowance increases to £200k for 2025
summary: Chancellor announces SEIS investment limit rises from £100k to £200k per tax year. Changes take effect from April 6, 2025, with retroactive applications allowed.

title: AI startup DeepMind competitor exits at £1.2B valuation
summary: London-based Synthesia acquired by Microsoft in largest UK AI exit of 2024. Early EIS investors see 45x returns over 6-year holding period.

title: European venture funding patterns shift
summary: Later-stage deals dominate as seed funding contracts 34% YoY. UK maintains 23% market share despite Brexit impacts. Focus shifting to climate tech. Not advice.

title: Cleantech investment hits record £8.4B in UK
summary: Green technology funding surpasses previous records as government incentives drive institutional interest. 67% of deals qualify for EIS relief.

title: Pension fund allocation to alternatives doubles
summary: UK pension schemes increase venture and growth allocations to 12% of AUM. New regulations allow greater risk-taking with defined contribution schemes.

title: PropTech unicorn Settled files for London IPO
summary: Property technology platform targets £2.8B valuation in planned March listing. Early investors include Atomico and Index Ventures with substantial EIS components.

title: Bank of England signals rate cuts ahead
summary: Governor Bailey hints at 50 basis point reduction by March as inflation target nears achievement. Positive for growth equity valuations and exit timing.
